title: potentilla neumanniana var. hirsuta
intro: Potentilla neumanniana var. hirsuta, also known as hirsute potentilla, is a variety of the Potentilla neumanniana plant, a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla neumanniana var. hirsuta include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its bioactive compounds.
